hero.title: Once an Angelenean, Always an Angelenean
hero.subtitle: Join thousands of AUF graduates making a difference across the Philippines and beyond. Your alma mater is proud of your achievements.

overview.title: A Legacy That Lives Beyond the Classroom
overview.description: For over six decades, Angeles University Foundation has been shaping future leaders, innovators, and change-makers. Our alumni network spans multiple countries and represents every major industry — from medicine and engineering to law, business, and the arts.
highlights: Top-performing graduates across PRC board examinations
Alumni serving in leadership roles in government and the private sector
Active alumni chapters in key cities nationwide and abroad
Ongoing mentorship programs connecting graduates with current students

association.title: AUF Alumni Association
association.description: The AUF Alumni Association (AUFAA) is the official organization of all AUF graduates. It bridges the university and its former students, fostering a lifelong connection to the institution and to each other.
objectives: Foster camaraderie and fellowship among AUF alumni worldwide
Support the university's mission through volunteerism and active advocacy
Provide networking and professional development opportunities for all members
Establish scholarship funds and financial assistance programs for students
Represent alumni interests in university governance and policy discussions
association.membershipNote: All AUF graduates are automatically members of the AUFAA. Connect with your college chapter to stay active and engaged.

notableAlumni.title: Distinguished AUF Alumni
notableAlumni.description: We celebrate the remarkable achievements of our graduates who have brought honor to AUF through their contributions to society, their professions, and their communities.
notableAlumni.nominationNote: Know an outstanding AUF alumnus? Nominate them for the Distinguished Alumni Award.
notableAlumni.nominationContactNote: Submit nominations to the Alumni Affairs Office at alumni@auf.edu.ph

benefits.title: What Your Alumni Membership Offers
benefits.description: As an AUF alumnus, you enjoy exclusive privileges that keep you connected to your university and give you a competitive advantage in your career.

categories.title: Library Access
items: Full access to the AUF Library and digital resource collections
Online journal and academic database subscriptions
Research assistance and interlibrary loan services

categories.title: Career Services
items: Job referral and placement assistance through the Career Development Center
Priority access to on-campus job fair events
Resume review and career counseling sessions

categories.title: Networking
items: Access to the AUF alumni directory and global network
Invitations to exclusive alumni networking events and reunions
Mentorship program matching graduates with current students

categories.title: Continuing Education
items: Discounted tuition for AUF graduate and post-graduate programs
Free access to select professional development seminars
Priority enrollment in executive education and short courses

events.title: Alumni News & Events
events.description: Stay connected with the latest happenings at AUF and within the alumni community.

featured.title: AUF Grand Alumni Homecoming
featured.venue: AUF Main Campus, MacArthur Highway, Angeles City
featured.description: Celebrate reunion milestones and reconnect with classmates at the biggest alumni gathering of the year. All classes are welcome.

featured.title: Distinguished Alumni Awards Night
featured.description: An evening of recognition honoring alumni who have demonstrated outstanding achievement and service in their respective fields.

featured.title: AUF Alumni Career Fair
featured.description: Alumni and industry partners come together to connect recent graduates with career opportunities across all sectors.

events.announcementNote: For the latest updates, follow the AUF Alumni Association on social media or contact the Alumni Affairs Office.

connect.title: Stay Connected with AUF
connect.description: Whether you graduated last year or decades ago, there are many ways to remain connected with your alma mater and help shape the next generation of AUF graduates.

channels.title: Update Your Profile
channels.description: Keep your contact and career information current so we can keep you informed about reunions, opportunities, and events relevant to your field.

channels.title: Join a Chapter
channels.description: Connect with your college chapter or regional alumni group and take part in local events, outreach programs, and advocacy initiatives.

channels.title: Become a Mentor
channels.description: Share your expertise and lived experience with current AUF students. Our mentorship program connects you with mentees in your field.

channels.title: Support AUF
channels.description: Contribute to scholarships, research, and student development — and honor the institution that helped launch your own career.

contact.label: Alumni Affairs Office
contact.campus: AUF Main Campus, MacArthur Highway, Angeles City
